description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, featuring large glass sliding doors and windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house includes multiple rooms, visible through the transparent sections, and appears to have an open-plan living and dining area. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and sliding glass doors on the main facades. The main entryway is defined by a set of glass doors, with no visible porch or overhang, emphasizing a minimalist design. The structure is likely constructed from concrete or masonry with significant glass elements, typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and large glass windows and doors. The design is minimalist with open-plan interiors and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with large glass sliding doors and windows, revealing the open-plan living and dining area inside.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear and side of the house, with fewer windows and a more solid wall presence, as well as a secondary entry or exit.
description_view_2: The front facade is visible here, featuring multiple large glass doors and windows, emphasizing the house's modern, open design.
description_view_3: This view displays the opposite side of the house, with a mix of solid walls and glass, and a glimpse into several interior rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features large glass doors with no porch or overhang, emphasizing a minimalist, open design
